overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Docker container log integration uses Vector to collect standard output (stdout/stderr) logs from containers. Supports automatic container discovery, multi-format log parsing, and automatic labeling of container metadata, helping you implement unified container log management.

items.title: Auto Discovery
items.description: Automatically discover and collect logs from running containers

items.title: Metadata Enrichment
items.description: Auto-add container name, image, labels and other metadata

items.title: Multi-format Parsing
items.description: Supports JSON, text, and other log formats

items.title: Flexible Filtering
items.description: Filter containers by name, image, labels and other conditions

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: Docker container logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:

tips.title: Docker Socket Access
tips.content: Vector needs access to Docker socket to discover containers. Ensure the user running Vector has access to /var/run/docker.sock.
